title: Cuspidaria inaequalis
taxonomy: Cuspidaria inaequalis is a species of saltwater clam, and it belongs to the family Cuspidariidae. This family is part of the phylum Mollusca and the class Bivalvia. The Cuspidariidae family is a group of marine bivalve mollusks that are typically small to medium in size. Cuspidaria inaequalis is further classified into the order Mytilida and the subclass Heteroconchia. The classification of Cuspidaria inaequalis helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships and ecological role in marine ecosystems.
